macro.intro: The macro environment is marked by geopolitical tensions with the US military poised for action against Iran. The 10Y TIPS Real Yield has slightly decreased to 1.89%, indicating a potential shift in investor sentiment. The Fed Funds Rate remains stable at 3.64%, while the M2 Money Supply shows a significant increase to $22,667.3 billion. No major economic events are scheduled today, but the ongoing Iran conflict is a critical factor.

setups.name: Gold Long on Geopolitical Tensions
setups.rationale: Gold is trading at $1985.50, up 0.75% today, driven by safe-haven demand amid US-Iran tensions. The 10Y TIPS Real Yield at 1.89% supports a bullish outlook. No major economic events today, but geopolitical risks are high.

metrics.label: Fear & Greed Index
metrics.text: Unavailable, but geopolitical fears are high

concerns.label: Primary risk
concerns.text: De-escalation in Iran could reduce gold demand

concerns.label: Secondary risk
concerns.text: Unexpected Fed rate hike could strengthen USD

setups.hedge: Consider shorting USD/JPY at 110.00 to hedge against USD strength.

setups.name: DAX Short on German Growth Concerns
setups.rationale: The German government has halved its 2026 growth forecast to 0.5% due to the Iran war. This negative outlook pressures the DAX index. No major economic events today, but geopolitical tensions remain a concern.

metrics.label: Geopolitical Risk
metrics.text: Ongoing Iran conflict impacts European markets

metrics.text: No major events, focus on geopolitical news

concerns.label: Primary risk
concerns.text: Resolution in Iran could boost European markets

setups.hedge: Consider long EUR/USD at 1.0900 to hedge against Euro strength.

setups.name: WTI Crude Long on Supply Concerns
setups.rationale: WTI Crude is trading at $82.30, up 1.20% today, driven by supply concerns due to halted Iranian petrochemical exports. The ongoing Iran conflict adds upward pressure.

contrarian.body: The S&P 500 is approaching its all-time high at 4510.25, with the RSI nearing overbought levels. Despite positive sentiment, geopolitical risks and the unchanged Fed Funds Rate at 3.64% suggest caution.
contrarian.warning: A sudden resolution in the Iran conflict could trigger a rapid market rally. Monitor geopolitical developments closely to adjust positions accordingly.

avoid.reason: Potential overbought conditions as tech stocks rally amid geopolitical tensions.
Uncertain Brexit impacts and lack of clear direction today.
